profile_basis.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RUSTFLAGS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-pass208-dispatch-profile cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- 'dispatch_latency|vmap_(eigh|svd|qr|scan|while)|eval_jaxpr_throughput' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RUSTFLAGS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-pass208-vmap-profile cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- 'vmap_' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

focused_baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RUSTFLAGS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-9cpxs-baseline cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_svd/batched_matrix_3x2 --sample-size 30 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
focused_baseline.note: The first same-worker candidate attempt queued for vmi1227854 and timed out before execution, so this baseline is not used as the primary scored comparison.

scored_rebench.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RUSTFLAGS,RCH_WORKER RCH_WORKER=vmi1227854 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-9cpxs-candidate2 cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_svd/batched_matrix_3x2 --sample-size 30 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

lever: For batch_svd_multi with DType::F64 only, accumulate U, S, and Vt outputs in Vec<f64> and construct TensorValue::new_f64_values outputs instead of materializing Vec<Literal> and TensorValue::new. Non-F64 paths keep the existing implementation.
isomorphism_proof: Accepted control-flow guards are unchanged until the new DType::F64 output-storage branch. Non-F64 tensors, non-rank-3 tensors, non-leading batch movement, full_matrices semantics, malformed element counts, and fallback/error paths remain routed as before.
The 3x2 thin SVD arithmetic path is unchanged: it reads the same six matrix entries in row-major order and calls svd_decompose_matrix_3x2_thin with the same values.
The generic SVD arithmetic path is unchanged: it pushes the same per-slice matrix entries into the same scratch buffer and calls svd_decompose_matrix with the same m, n, and full_matrices parameters.

U, singular values, and Vt are extended from svd_scratch in the same order. The only observable storage change is dense F64 LiteralBuffer backing; materializing it yields the same Literal::F64Bits values.
Output dtype, shapes, output ordering, batch_dim=0, SVD ordering/tie behavior, sign behavior, floating-point arithmetic, RNG absence, cache-key inputs, and transform order are unchanged.

golden.payload: JSON fixture of U/S/Vt shapes and f64 bit patterns via fj_test_utils::fixture_id_from_json

validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RUSTFLAGS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-9cpxs-test-final cargo test -p fj-dispatch --lib svd -- --nocapture

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_QUEUE_WHEN_BUSY=1 RCH_PRIORITY=high RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RUSTFLAGS,RCH_QUEUE_WHEN_BUSY,RCH_PRIORITY rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-9cpxs-check3 cargo check -p fj-dispatch --all-targets
validation.result: passed; unchanged fj-trace unused variable and fj-lax dead_code dependency warnings remain
failed on pre-existing broad formatting drift in batching.rs outside this lever; touched hunk was aligned with rustfmt's suggested style
exit 0; critical issues 0; UBS shadow fmt/check/clippy/test-build sections clean; broad pre-existing warnings inventory remains
not executed directly after three attempts because RCH reported no admissible workers (critical_pressure=1, insufficient_slots=1); UBS shadow clippy was clean

rch_notes: First vmi1227854 candidate after-row timed out in the RCH queue before any benchmark executed.
A later candidate selected ovh-a despite the vmi1227854 hint; it is scored against the pre-edit ovh-a profile row for the same target.
RCH posture was degraded during validation: 2/10 workers healthy, ovh-a critical pressure, and several workers with stale telemetry.
